restricted_mm {
  n0: 1
  n1: 2
  n2: 3
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[10]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    text: "[01]"
  }
  tensor: "0"
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 1
  n0: 1
  n1: 2
  n2: 3
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[10]"
  }
  tensor: "a01*b10*c00 + a01*b11*c10 + a01*b12*c20"
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 2
  n0: 1
  n1: 2
  n2: 3
  p: 2
  tensor: "a00*b00*c00 + a00*b01*c10 + a00*b02*c20 + a01*b10*c00 + a01*b11*c10 + a01*b12*c20"
}
